$comment: Layer A for TIER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Generated amounts span all four EVALUATE bands (>=1000, >=500, >=100, other) plus the PIC 9(7)V99 range, so band selection and per-band rounding are exercised by seeded random inputs alone.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TIER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tier)
